name: Saucy Italian Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese or 1/4 cup grated parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, combine all ingredients except the cheese.
3. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the top of the mixture.
4. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the zucchini is tender.
